name: Entra ID Free
businessFunction: Provides core directory, SSO, basic MFA, and user administration.
businessValue: Centralizes identity control for Microsoft 365 and connected apps.
notes: Core identity, SSO, basic MFA, and user management capabilities included with Microsoft 365 tenants.

name: Entra ID P1
businessFunction: Applies access policies across users, devices, apps, and conditions.
businessValue: Reduces risky access while keeping user sign-in practical.
notes: Adds Conditional Access, hybrid identity, dynamic groups, and self-service password reset writeback.

name: Entra ID P2
businessFunction: Detects identity risk and supports privileged access and access reviews.
businessValue: Helps prevent account compromise and excessive standing access.
notes: Adds identity risk detection, Privileged Identity Management, and access reviews.

name: Multifactor Authentication
businessFunction: Requires an additional verification factor during sign-in.
businessValue: Reduces account takeover risk from stolen passwords.
notes: Baseline MFA is available broadly. Conditional Access-driven MFA requires Entra ID P1 or higher.

name: Conditional Access
businessFunction: Controls access based on user, device, app, location, and risk signals.
businessValue: Enforces adaptive access without blocking trusted work patterns.
notes: Use policy-based access controls across users, devices, apps, and risk signals.

name: Privileged Identity Management
businessFunction: Grants privileged roles only when needed and with approval controls.
businessValue: Limits standing administrator access and reduces privilege abuse risk.
notes: Just-in-time privileged access for Entra ID and Azure roles.

name: Entra ID Protection
businessFunction: Detects risky users and sign-ins and can trigger remediation.
businessValue: Speeds response to likely identity compromise.
notes: Risk-based detections and automated remediation require Entra ID P2.

name: Single Sign-On
businessFunction: Provides single sign-on to cloud applications using common identity protocols.
businessValue: Improves user experience while centralizing application access control.
notes: Integrated SAML, OIDC, and gallery app SSO for cloud applications.

name: Passwordless Authentication
businessFunction: Enables passwordless sign-in with authenticator apps, security keys, or Windows Hello.
businessValue: Reduces password dependence and improves phishing resistance.
notes: Supports Microsoft Authenticator, FIDO2 security keys, and Windows Hello for Business.

name: Exchange Online Protection
businessFunction: Filters inbound and outbound mail for spam, malware, and known threats.
businessValue: Reduces commodity email threats before they reach users.
notes: Baseline anti-spam and anti-malware protection for Exchange Online mailboxes.

name: Defender for Office 365 Plan 1
businessFunction: Adds advanced phishing, link, and attachment protections for Exchange Online.
businessValue: Improves email defense without adding a separate gateway platform.
notes: Adds Safe Links, Safe Attachments, and enhanced anti-phishing controls; included with Microsoft 365 E3 and higher in M365 Maps.

name: Safe Links
businessFunction: Checks links at click time and detonates suspicious URLs.
businessValue: Reduces successful phishing from malicious or rewritten links.
notes: Time-of-click URL detonation and rewrite protection.

name: Safe Attachments
businessFunction: Opens suspicious attachments in a sandbox before delivery.
businessValue: Reduces malware risk from weaponized email attachments.
notes: Attachment sandboxing for Exchange, SharePoint, OneDrive, and Teams workloads.

name: Anti-Phishing Policies
businessFunction: Detects spoofing, impersonation, and advanced phishing patterns.
businessValue: Reduces business email compromise and credential theft risk.
notes: Advanced impersonation and spoof intelligence are in Defender for Office 365.

name: Defender for Office 365 Plan 2
businessFunction: Combines email threat investigation, automated response, and training simulations.
businessValue: Improves readiness across security teams and end users.
notes: Includes Plan 1 plus Threat Explorer, automated investigation, and training simulations.

name: Threat Explorer
businessFunction: Hunts, investigates, and remediates email and collaboration threats.
businessValue: Shortens investigation time and improves response consistency.
notes: Hunt, investigate, and remediate email and collaboration threats.

name: Attack Simulation Training
businessFunction: Simulates real-world attacks to train users and test defenses.
businessValue: Reduces successful attacks by improving user awareness and behavior.
notes: Phishing simulation and end-user training campaigns.

name: Defender for Endpoint Plan 1
businessFunction: Protects endpoints with antivirus, attack surface reduction, and endpoint controls.
businessValue: Reduces endpoint compromise risk across managed devices.
notes: Endpoint protection, attack surface reduction, and next-generation protection for supported platforms.

name: Defender for Endpoint Plan 2
businessFunction: Provides EDR, automated investigation, advanced hunting, and vulnerability insights.
businessValue: Improves endpoint threat detection, response, and prioritization.
notes: Adds EDR, automated investigation, threat and vulnerability management, and advanced hunting.

name: Defender Antivirus
businessFunction: Protects Windows devices with built-in antivirus and malware prevention.
businessValue: Reduces endpoint malware risk using controls already included with Windows.
notes: Built into Windows and managed through Defender for Endpoint and Intune.

name: Defender Vulnerability Management
businessFunction: Discovers endpoint vulnerabilities and prioritizes remediation by risk.
businessValue: Helps security teams reduce exploitable exposure on managed devices.
notes: Core vulnerability management is included with Defender for Endpoint Plan 2 in E5 and E7. Premium Defender Vulnerability Management capabilities are licensed as an add-on.

name: Intune Plan 1
businessFunction: Manages device configuration, compliance, and applications across endpoints.
businessValue: Improves endpoint control without relying on separate device management tools.
notes: Device and application management for modern endpoints.

name: Defender for Cloud Apps
businessFunction: Discovers SaaS usage and applies controls to risky cloud applications.
businessValue: Reduces shadow IT and cloud app exposure across the organization.
notes: SaaS discovery, cloud app risk, session controls, and app governance signals.

name: App Governance
businessFunction: Monitors OAuth apps and remediates risky application behavior.
businessValue: Reduces data exposure from over-permissioned or suspicious cloud apps.
notes: OAuth app governance and remediation for Microsoft 365 apps.

name: Defender for Identity
businessFunction: Detects suspicious activity against on-premises Active Directory identities.
businessValue: Improves visibility into identity attacks that start outside the cloud.
notes: Detects identity threats across on-premises Active Directory signals.

name: Adaptive Protection
businessFunction: Adjusts data protection controls based on detected insider risk levels.
businessValue: Applies stronger controls where user behavior indicates higher data risk.
notes: Dynamically adjusts DLP controls based on insider risk levels.

name: Data Loss Prevention
businessFunction: Detects and controls sensitive data sharing across Microsoft 365 workloads.
businessValue: Reduces accidental or unauthorized leakage of regulated information.
notes: DLP for Exchange, SharePoint, OneDrive, Teams, and endpoints depending on workload and plan.

name: Information Protection
businessFunction: Classifies, labels, and protects sensitive content with policy-based controls.
businessValue: Keeps sensitive data protected as it moves across users and locations.
notes: Sensitivity labels and encryption support; automatic classification expands in E5.

name: eDiscovery Standard
businessFunction: Searches, preserves, and exports Microsoft 365 content for legal matters.
businessValue: Supports common legal discovery needs without a separate discovery platform.
notes: Core content search, holds, and export workflows.

name: eDiscovery Premium
businessFunction: Adds custodian management, review sets, analytics, and richer review workflows.
businessValue: Improves legal review efficiency for complex investigations and litigation.
notes: Adds custodians, review sets, analytics, and richer legal workflows.

name: Communication Compliance
businessFunction: Detects and reviews inappropriate, sensitive, or regulated communications.
businessValue: Helps compliance teams address communication risks before they escalate.
notes: Detects and reviews inappropriate, sensitive, or regulated communications.

name: Insider Risk Management
businessFunction: Correlates user activity signals to identify potential insider risk events.
businessValue: Helps detect risky data behavior while supporting structured investigations.
notes: Correlates activities and signals for potential data leakage or policy violations.

name: Records Management
businessFunction: Applies advanced retention labels, record declaration, and disposition workflows.
businessValue: Supports defensible records retention and disposal for regulated content.
notes: Advanced retention labels, disposition review, and record declaration.

name: Data Lifecycle Management
businessFunction: Manages advanced retention and deletion policies across Microsoft 365 data.
businessValue: Reduces stale data and supports governance obligations at scale.
notes: Advanced Purview Data Lifecycle Management is listed with E5 and E7; basic retention policies are tracked separately.

name: Audit Standard
businessFunction: Records user and admin activity across Microsoft 365 services.
businessValue: Provides baseline investigation evidence for security and compliance reviews.
notes: Unified audit logging for Microsoft 365 activity.

name: Audit Premium
businessFunction: Provides longer audit retention and high-value event visibility.
businessValue: Strengthens investigations that require deeper historical evidence.
notes: Longer retention and high-value event auditing for investigations.

name: Retention Policies
businessFunction: Applies retention and deletion rules across Microsoft 365 workloads.
businessValue: Helps meet retention obligations while reducing unmanaged data growth.
notes: Manage retention and deletion across Microsoft 365 workloads.

name: Information Barriers
businessFunction: Restricts communication and collaboration between defined user groups.
businessValue: Supports ethical wall and regulatory separation requirements.
notes: Limit communication and collaboration between groups for regulatory needs.

name: Exchange Online
businessFunction: Provides business email, calendar, contacts, and mailbox services.
businessValue: Consolidates core messaging and scheduling into Microsoft 365.
notes: Business email, calendar, contacts, and mailbox features. Archive capacity varies by plan and configuration.

name: SharePoint Online
businessFunction: Hosts team sites, intranet content, lists, and document libraries.
businessValue: Centralizes collaboration and content management for business teams.
notes: Sites, intranet, content services, lists, and document management.

name: OneDrive for Business
businessFunction: Provides personal file storage, sync, sharing, and recovery for users.
businessValue: Reduces dependence on separate file sync and sharing platforms.
notes: Personal file storage and sync for Microsoft 365 users.

name: Microsoft Teams
businessFunction: Provides chat, meetings, channels, calling integrations, and collaboration spaces.
businessValue: Consolidates real-time teamwork into the Microsoft 365 experience.
notes: Chat, meetings, channels, calling integrations, and collaboration. M365 Maps marks Teams as optional; telephony features require add-ons.

name: Microsoft 365 Apps
businessFunction: Provides desktop Office apps for documents, spreadsheets, presentations, and mail.
businessValue: Supports everyday productivity with standard Microsoft 365 applications.
notes: Desktop Office apps are included with Microsoft 365 E3 and higher.

name: Power Apps for Microsoft 365
businessFunction: Builds business apps using standard connectors within Microsoft 365 rights.
businessValue: Enables teams to digitize processes without full custom development.
notes: Use standard connectors within Microsoft 365 rights; premium connectors require additional licensing.

name: Power Automate for Microsoft 365
businessFunction: Automates workflows and approvals using standard Microsoft 365 connectors.
businessValue: Reduces manual process work across common business tasks.
notes: Automate workflows using standard connectors within Microsoft 365 rights.

name: Viva Insights
businessFunction: Provides personal and organizational insights into work patterns.
businessValue: Helps improve productivity, wellbeing, and collaboration habits.
notes: Personal insights are broadly available; advanced organization insights require higher licensing.

name: BitLocker
businessFunction: Encrypts Windows device drives and protects data at rest.
businessValue: Reduces data exposure if a device is lost or stolen.
notes: Full-disk encryption for Windows devices, managed through policy.

name: Windows Hello for Business
businessFunction: Enables phishing-resistant sign-in to Windows using biometrics or PIN-backed keys.
businessValue: Improves sign-in security while reducing password reliance.
notes: Passwordless, phishing-resistant sign-in for Windows devices.

name: Windows Autopatch
businessFunction: Uses Microsoft-managed update rings for Windows, Microsoft 365 Apps, Edge, and Teams.
businessValue: Reduces operational effort for keeping managed endpoints current.
notes: Microsoft-managed update rings for Windows, Microsoft 365 Apps, Edge, and Teams.

name: Application Control for Business
businessFunction: Restricts which applications and code can run on Windows devices.
businessValue: Reduces malware and unauthorized software execution risk.
notes: Application allow-listing and control using Windows security features.

name: Windows LAPS
businessFunction: Manages and rotates local administrator passwords on Windows devices.
businessValue: Reduces lateral movement risk from reused local admin credentials.
notes: Local administrator password management built into Windows and Entra joined scenarios.

name: Windows Update for Business
businessFunction: Controls Windows update policies, rings, and deployment timing.
businessValue: Keeps endpoints current while reducing update disruption.
notes: Manage Windows update policies, rings, and deployment timing.
